requirement_topic.en: SPRK/AST Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Continental European Network
requirement_topic.zh: SPRK/AST并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz欧洲大陆电网
requirement_topic.zht: SPRK/AST併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz歐洲大陸電網

summary.en: Latvia electricity supply is regulated by the Public Utilities Commission (SPRK), with Augstsprieguma tīkls (AST) as the transmission system operator. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Latvia recently synchronised its grid with the Continental European synchronous area (de-synchronisation from the BRELL ring completed in early 2025), which may affect certain protection relay settings, frequency response thresholds, and ride-through requirements compared to the previous configuration. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring SPRK/AST supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 拉脱维亚电力供应由公共事业监管委员会（SPRK）监管，Augstsprieguma tīkls（AST）为输电系统运营商。低压电网环境为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。拉脱维亚近期已与欧洲大陆同步区域完成电网同步（于2025年初完成与BRELL环路的解同步），与此前配置相比，这可能影响某些保护继电器设置、频率响应阈值和穿越要求。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成SPRK/AST供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。
summary.zht: 拉脫維亞電力供應由公共事業監管委員會（SPRK）監管，Augstsprieguma tīkls（AST）為輸電系統運營商。低壓電網環境為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。拉脫維亞近期已與歐洲大陸同步區域完成電網同步（於2025年初完成與BRELL環路的解同步），與此前配置相比，這可能影響某些保護繼電器設置、頻率響應閾值和穿越要求。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成SPRK/AST供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。

standards_or_laws: SPRK (Public Utilities Commission) electricity network connection and project acceptance requirements for Latvia
AST (Augstsprieguma tīkls) grid connection technical rules for Latvia
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Latvia 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：拉脱维亚230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：拉脫維亞230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for SPRK/AST review. Latvia's recent Continental European grid synchronisation may require updated frequency-response and protection relay settings; verify current AST technical requirements before shipment. Latvian-language documentation may be required for certain project filings.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按SPRK/AST审查准备。拉脱维亚近期与欧洲大陆电网同步可能要求更新频率响应和保护继电器设置；出货前请核实当前AST技术要求。部分项目申报可能要求拉脱维亚语文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按SPRK/AST審查準備。拉脫維亞近期與歐洲大陸電網同步可能要求更新頻率響應和保護繼電器設置；出貨前請核實當前AST技術要求。部分項目申報可能要求拉脫維亞語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require SPRK/AST project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz (Continental European synchronous area), which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a SPRK/AST Latvia approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Latvia 230/400 V

source.publisher: Augstsprieguma tīkls (AST — Latvia Transmission System Operator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Latvia-ready EVSE needs SPRK/AST project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Latvia's recent Continental European grid synchronisation may introduce additional requirements; verify current AST technical rules before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向拉脱维亚的EVSE需要SPRK/AST项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。拉脱维亚近期与欧洲大陆电网的同步可能引入额外要求；出货前请核实当前AST技术规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向拉脫維亞的EVSE需要SPRK/AST項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。拉脫維亞近期與歐洲大陸電網的同步可能引入額外要求；出貨前請核實當前AST技術規則。
